Element.Name: Transaction identifier
Element.Description: Identification of the transaction to be used if the message is sent via the Peppol network.

Element.Name: Business process identifier
Element.Description: Identification of the business process to be used if the message is sent via the Peppol network.

Element.Name: Document identification
Element.Description: A unique identification of the CV-request. UUID issued by the sender.

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: Description of role or job title that the CV is requested for.

Element.Name: EHF-CV issue date
Element.Description: The date when the CV-request was issued. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: EHF-CV issue time
Element.Description: The time when the CV-request was issued. Format "HH:MM:SS"

Element.Name: Party name
Element.Description: Name of company sending the CV-request.

Element.Name: Sender country code
Element.Description: A code that identifies the country.

Element.Name: Sender contact telephone number
Element.Description: A phone number for the contact person

Element.Name: Sender contact email address
Element.Description: An e-mail address for the contact person

Element.Name: Party name
Element.Description: Name of company receiving the CV-request.

Element.Name: Receiver country code
Element.Description: A code that identifies the country.

Element.Name: Receiver contact telephone number
Element.Description: A phone number for the contact person

Element.Name: Receiver contact email address
Element.Description: An e-mail address for the contact person

Element.Name: Valid to date
Element.Description: The date when the Police certificate is valid to. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Relevant experience
Element.Description: Relevant experience as alternative to education

Element.Name: Alternative education
Element.Description: Education as alternative to main requirement

Element.Name: Course
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about Course

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: The start of the Course period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: The end of the Course period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: The start of the Course period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: The end of the Course period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Certification
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about Certification

Element.Name: Language skills
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about Language skills

Element.Name: Oral skill
Element.Description: Level of oral skill according to code list

Element.Name: Written skill
Element.Description: Level of written skill according to code list

Element.Name: Oral skill
Element.Description: Level of oral skill according to code list

Element.Name: Written skill
Element.Description: Level of written skill according to code list

Element.Name: Project experience
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about project experience

Element.Name: Experience type
Element.Description: Type of project experience according to code list

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: Type of industry according to code list

Element.Name: Work place
Element.Description: Country code according to code list

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: The start of the ProjectExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: The end of the ProjectExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Position percent
Element.Description: Percent of the position relevant for the experience

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The candidates role in the project

Element.Name: Project value
Element.Description: Value of the project in money

Element.Name: Experience type
Element.Description: Type of project experience according to code list

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: Type of industry according to code list

Element.Name: Work place
Element.Description: Country code according to code list

Element.Name: Work experience
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about work experience

Element.Name: Position level
Element.Description: Level of position according to code list

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: Type of industry according to code list

Element.Name: Work place
Element.Description: Country code according to code list

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: The start of the WorkExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: The end of the WorkExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Position percent
Element.Description: Percent of the position relevant for the experience

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The candidates role in the project

Element.Name: Activities
Element.Value: Testing and developing IT-systems in X company

Element.Name: Position level
Element.Description: Level of position according to code list

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: Type of industry according to code list

Element.Name: Work place
Element.Description: Country code according to code list

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: The start of the WorkExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: The end of the WorkExperience period. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Position percent
Element.Description: Percent of the position relevant for the experience

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The candidates role in the project

Element.Name: Activities
Element.Value: Testing and developing IT-systems in X company

Element.Name: Skills
Element.Description: A group of business terms providing information about Skills

Element.Name: Last practice
Element.Description: Date for last practice of the skill. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Minimum length of practice
Element.Description: Minimum length of practice including unit of measure

Element.Name: Skills reference
Element.Description: To specify the need for a reference/contact person (true or false)

Element.Name: Last practice
Element.Description: Date for last practice of the skill. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"

Element.Name: Minimum length of practice
Element.Description: Minimum length of practice including unit of measure

Element.Name: Skills reference
Element.Description: To specify the need for a reference/contact person (true or false)

Element.Name: Level
Element.Description: Level of clearance according to code list

Element.Name: Expiration date
Element.Description: Expiration date for the clearance. Format "YYYY-MM-DD"
